scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @chaos-swarm/agent-core build && pnpm --filter @chaos-swarm/reporting build && pnpm --filter @chaos-swarm/web dev
scripts.dev:web: pnpm --filter @chaos-swarm/agent-core build && pnpm --filter @chaos-swarm/reporting build && pnpm --filter @chaos-swarm/web dev
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @chaos-swarm/web lint && pnpm --filter @chaos-swarm/agent-core typecheck && pnpm --filter @chaos-swarm/reporting typecheck
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @chaos-swarm/web exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @chaos-swarm/agent-core typecheck && pnpm --filter @chaos-swarm/reporting typecheck
